name: Favorite Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the yeast mixture well.
2. Gradually add 1 1/2 cups of unbleached flour, beating until smooth.
3. Add the remaining 1 1/2 cups of flour. If necessary, knead by hand.
4. Shape into a round and place in a greased 16 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1/2 inch pan.
5. Spread with your favorite sauce and toppings.
6. Bake for approximately 15-20 minutes at 450 degrees F (232 C).
7. This is my own recipe, so you may need to adjust the ingredients slightly to achieve the desired consistency and flavor.
